name: Native Device Settings
description: Direct control over device hardware like Flashlight, WiFi, Data, and Do Not Disturb using native Android commands.

toolDeclarations.name: toggle_flashlight
toolDeclarations.description: Turn the device flashlight (torch) on or off directly using native commands.

toolDeclarations.name: set_volume
toolDeclarations.description: Set the system media volume by percentage.

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable

toolDeclarations.name: set_mobile_data
toolDeclarations.description: Enable or disable mobile data connectivity.

enabled.description: True to enable, False to disable
True to enable (Zen Mode), False to disable
